title: Donations and grants
doc_html:
§834.  Donations and grants

The Louisiana Cypress Sawmill Museum may directly, or indirectly through the board of directors of the Louisiana State Museum or the Louisiana Museum Foundation, receive donations and grants from individuals, corporations, private foundations, and local, state, and federal governmental agencies, entities, or subdivisions in order to further the provisions of this Chapter.

Acts 1997, No. 722, §1.
